name: ProtocolGen-${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: Protocol and documentation specialist agent grounded in approved templates and connector content.

conversation_starters.title: Protocol outline
conversation_starters.text: Draft a Phase II protocol outline for this diabetes study concept.

conversation_starters.text: Create an SOP skeleton for investigational product handling.

conversation_starters.title: Consent gaps
conversation_starters.text: What information is missing from this consent form outline?

conversation_starters.title: Endpoint wording
conversation_starters.text: Draft endpoint language using our approved protocol template style.

conversation_starters.title: Review mailbox
conversation_starters.text: Summarize recent protocol review feedback from the shared mailbox.

conversation_starters.title: Controlled docs
conversation_starters.text: Find the current SOP for deviation management and summarize it.

disclaimer.text: Research and operational support only. Validate all outputs with approved sources and qualified experts before clinical, regulatory, or patient-impacting use.
